email_body:
Beste Pieter,

Graag stel ik me kandidaat voor de stage Online Marketing/Communicatie bij Landrada Consulting. Ik ben een junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, contentcreatie en WordPress. Bij Episto werk ik aan on-page SEO en het bouwen van websites voor klanten. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gewerkt aan technische SEO en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Landrada is de focus op KMO's en de kans om écht mee te denken en bij te dragen. Ik wil graag mijn kennis van online marketing verdiepen, vooral in Google Ads en social advertising, en leren hoe strategische keuzes worden gemaakt voor kleine ondernemingen. Ik werk gestructureerd, ben leergierig en durf vragen te stellen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik hoop dat mijn motivatie en technische basis aansluiten bij wat jullie zoeken.

Ik voeg mijn cv bij en hoor graag of we kunnen kennismaken.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Pieter,

I would like to apply for the internship in Online Marketing/Communications at Landrada Consulting. I am a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content creation, and WordPress. At Episto, I work on on-page SEO and building websites for clients. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I have worked on technical SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines.

What appeals to me about Landrada is the focus on SMEs and the opportunity to truly contribute and think along. I want to deepen my knowledge of online marketing, especially in Google Ads and social advertising, and learn how strategic choices are made for small businesses. I work in a structured way, am eager to learn, and am not afraid to ask questions.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking classes to improve). I hope my motivation and technical foundation match what you are looking for.

I attach my CV and look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Pieter,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Stagiair(e) Online Marketing/Communicatie bij Landrada Consulting. Jullie oproep voor iemand met 'goesting, motivatie en leergierigheid' spreekt me direct aan. Ik ben een junior digital marketer met een technische basis in SEO, GEO en webontwikkeling, en ik zoek een stage waar ik écht kan meewerken en bijleren.

Momenteel werk ik bij Episto als junior digital marketer, waar ik verantwoordelijk ben voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-websites met Elementor en Astra. Ik gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik mijn eigen project mirook.com opgezet, een website voor een Belgische jeugdschaakkampioen, waar ik gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO-technieken heb toegepast om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Wat ik vooral wil leren bij Landrada is hoe online marketing strategisch wordt ingezet voor KMO's. Ik ben nieuwsgierig naar Google Ads en social advertising, en ik wil graag zien hoe campagnes worden opgebouwd en geoptimaliseerd. Jullie aanpak – geen dummy-taken, maar echte verantwoordelijkheid met begeleiding – past perfect bij mijn leerstijl. Ik werk gestructureerd, denk creatief mee en durf vragen te stellen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn technische achtergrond en leergierigheid een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan jullie team.

Ik voeg mijn cv bij en hoop dat we kunnen kennismaken.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Pieter,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the internship in Online Marketing/Communications at Landrada Consulting. Your call for someone with 'drive, motivation, and eagerness to learn' immediately appeals to me. I am a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in SEO, GEO, and web development, and I am looking for an internship where I can truly contribute and learn.

Currently, I work at Episto as a junior digital marketer, where I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress websites with Elementor and Astra. I use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, I have set up my own project mirook.com, a website for a Belgian youth chess champion, where I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines.

What I especially want to learn at Landrada is how online marketing is strategically applied for SMEs. I am curious about Google Ads and social advertising, and I want to see how campaigns are built and optimized. Your approach – no dummy tasks, but real responsibility with guidance – fits my learning style perfectly. I work in a structured way, think creatively, and am not afraid to ask questions.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking classes to improve). I am confident that with my technical background and eagerness to learn, I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

I attach my CV and hope we can meet.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on SEO & content experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, blog writing, and performance tracking with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console
• WordPress website building and maintenance using Elementor and Astra theme, including content management and page updates
• Project mirook.com: implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO techniques for AI search visibility
• Social media integration and content coordination (Instagram, Facebook) for client sites
• Strong analytical and structured working style, with fluency in English and Turkish and ongoing Dutch learning (B1)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
